lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

Get ready for a reliable daily driver that’s ready for its next adventure! This car has been well-loved and shows some honest wear, but it still offers a solid, dependable ride. It's a great choice for anyone looking for functional transportation at a fantastic value. While it has some cosmetic imperfections and typical signs of use, it remains a sturdy companion for your daily commutes!

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, essentially indistinguishable from a showroom model. It has been meticulously cared for, stored in a climate-controlled garage, and features flawless original paint with no scratches or dents. The interior is immaculate, with the leather still smelling new and all electronic components functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is superb; the engine runs silently and the transmission shifts seamlessly. Buyers can expect a vehicle that requires absolutely no immediate maintenance and offers a driving experience as if it just rolled off the assembly line. It comes with full service records and all original accessories.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior shows minor signs of use, such as small stone chips on the hood, but the paint retains a healthy shine. Inside, the upholstery is clean with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts as it should, and all electronics are fully functional. It has a consistent service history, and while it isn't a showroom piece, it is a dependable and attractive vehicle ready for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition. The engine and transmission function properly. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear, including small scratches and paint chips. The interior is clean with some light wear.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several minor scratches and a few small dents. The interior shows visible wear from regular use, including some fading on the seats. The car is functional and runs as expected for its age.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and reliability. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and road-readiness. Secure this exceptional value today.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready to hit the road today? I’m parting ways with my favorite car, and it’s been such a joy to drive! It’s in really nice shape, super dependable, and has plenty of life left in it for all your weekend trips or daily commutes. It’s been well-loved and looked after, so you’re getting a solid vehicle that’s ready for a new home. I’d love for someone to enjoy it as much as I have—shoot me a message if you’re interested!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specimen, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a crisp 8,000 RPM redline. Mechanically robust, the VANOS unit has been overhauled and the rear subframe reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. Power is managed through a tactile 6-speed manual gearbox and a limited-slip differential, providing exceptional power delivery and corner-exit traction. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein dampers and refreshed bushings, offering surgical turn-in and a balanced center of gravity. While the car shows minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the drivetrain remains tight and the throttle response is instantaneous. A mechanically sound driver’s car ready for the canyons.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style. The exterior presents beautifully with a deep luster, showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use such as a few faint stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, with the upholstery and dashboard materials retaining their original texture and integrity. All electronic components, from the premium sound system to the climate control, are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has followed a strict service schedule, resulting in a smooth engine idle and crisp, responsive gear shifts. The tires have significant tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and confident. This is a dependable, well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to drive away with peace of mind.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of notable mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. With a consistent maintenance history and a focus on long-term durability, this offering represents an excellent balance of sophistication and value. We invite discerning buyers to experience the superior road presence and refined handling of this well-preserved automobile.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it offers an exceptional driving experience for the discerning owner. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile at a compelling valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been truly loved? This beauty runs like a dream and is ready for its next big adventure! It’s in great shape and has been super well-maintained, making it the perfect choice if you want quality and comfort without the brand-new price tag. I’ve absolutely enjoyed driving this car, and I know you will too. Come check it out and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power unit, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes reinforced rear subframe mounting points and refreshed rod bearings. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and Bilstein dampers, ensuring precise turn-in and mid-corner stability. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity is robust with consistent compression across all cylinders.
Used car. Good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the lightest signs of road use, while the alloy wheels remain crisp and free of major curbing. Inside, the cabin is a testament to careful ownership; the upholstery is supple and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, having undergone regular synthetic oil changes and scheduled inspections. The engine runs quietly, the transmission shifts are buttery smooth, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. This car is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer seeking a well-cared-for, high-quality driver that looks and feels much newer than its odometer suggests.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure both mechanical reliability and a refined driving experience. Its aesthetic appeal and consistent performance history make it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value and long-term dependability.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and poise. The exterior retains a commanding presence, while the interior remains exemplary of high-tier comfort and functionality. A premier choice for those who demand excellence and proven performance.
